verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge elected not to ask any follow-up questions (discussion_rounds=0). While the initial assessments were unanimous and high-confidence, a score of 0.5 reflects that the strategy was passive; the judge relied entirely on the initial independent assessments without attempting to resolve the remaining medium-confidence candidates (e.g., Spain, Colombia) through targeted questioning.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence from all five agents. The linguistic evidence ('Rosticeria'), landscape cues (arid plateau, greenhouse agriculture), and regulatory/infrastructure details (concrete poles, right-hand traffic) were all correctly identified and weighted to reach the correct conclusion (Mexico).
